title: Silky Romantic Polish Cod Salad
description: A fragrant, silky salad of broiled cod, basil, and a delicate vinaigrette, perfect for a romantic evening.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to high and position the rack 4 inches from the heat source.
Pat the cod dry and drizzle 1 tablespoon of olive oil over it; season with salt and pepper.
Place the cod on a broiler pan and broil for 5-6 minutes until the edges turn opaque; flip and broil for an additional 3-4 minutes until cooked through.
In a small bowl whisk together the remaining olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, capers, and a pinch of salt and pepper to create the vinaigrette.
Remove the cod from the broiler, let it rest for 2 minutes, then cut into bite‑sized pieces.
In a large bowl combine the cod, chopped basil, and microgreens.
Drizzle the dressing over the salad and gently toss to coat.
Serve immediately, garnishing with extra basil leaves if desired.
